item.title: F-025d: AI Continue Writing (Ghost Text)
item.intent: The editor should anticipate what you want to write next — ghost text that appears naturally after a pause and accepts with Tab
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-041 (AI Model Pipeline), FEAT-039 (Text Engine). After a 3-second typing pause at end of text, AI generates 1-3 sentences continuing the thought. Appears as dimmed ghost text inline at cursor. Tab accepts (text inserted, ghost text becomes real). Typing any character dismisses ghost text. Can be toggled off in settings (FEAT-042). Must not conflict with auto-formatting. First token <500ms.
acceptanceCriteria: Ghost text appears after 3-second pause at end of content
Tab key accepts ghost text and it becomes real document text
Typing any character dismisses ghost text immediately
Ghost text does not appear inside code blocks
Ghost text can be toggled off in settings
Ghost text does not trigger auto-formatting rules
VoiceOver announces AI suggestion available when ghost text appears
